test_sufficiency_summary: Coverage is sufficient for this subtask: tactical source-inspection assertions lock the constructor away from free-positioned spin control creation, live GUI smoke coverage instantiates FBattleScreen and verifies the speed control has non-root parentage and allocated size, and the verifier reran TacticalTests and GuiTests without any GtkSpinButton assertion.
